svg.title: The Green Revolution trade-off: output up, water tables down
svg.desc: The Green Revolution trade-off: output up, water tables down. Source: Evenson and Gollin; FAO AQUASTAT; illustrative index. Output index is illustrative; water-depth trends vary by region and are shown as a directional signal.
